query:
SELECT 
  SUM(principal) as principal,
  SUM(interest) as interest,
  SUM(fee) as fee,
  SUM(penalty) as penalty,
  SUM(unlock_fee) as unlock_fee,
  SUM(overpaid) as overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt) as bad_debt,
  SUM(discount) as discount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_amount,
  SUM(payment_tx_amount) as payment_tx_amount,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid) as sum_fields_no_bad_debt,
  SUM(principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid + bad_debt) as sum_fields_with_bad_debt,
  SUM(principal + interest + fee + penalty + unlock_fee + overpaid + bad_debt - discount) as sum_fields_minus_discount
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
